SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT TU, LYNN AS TO PLAINTIFF MCNEANEY, TAYLOR
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE DATED JULY 7, 2009.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-10-2009 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. COPY SENT TO PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-10-2009 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. COPY SENT TO PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JUL-24-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MCNEANEY, TAYLOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO ADAM SMITH.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO ALANNA BLOUGH.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, ADAM BLOUGH, ALANNA MCNEANEY, TAYLOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TU, LYNN $2,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $18.00 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,253.00, THE COURT FINDS: 1. PLAINTIFFS ADMITTED THEY WERE DUE $2700.00. 2. THIS AWARD IS REDUCED BY $550.00 FOR DAMAGE TO THE WINDOWS, SIDE DOOR AND LOST KEYS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TU, LYNN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SMITH, ADAM BLOUGH, ALANNA MCNEANEY, TAYLOR DEFENDANT'S CROSS CLAIM IS DENIED BECAUSE SHE FAILED TO PROVE THAT DAMAGES WERE CAUSED BY PLAINTIFFS AND WAS NOT RESULT IN A DETERIORATION OF THE PROPERTY ITSELF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TU, LYNN HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-21-2010 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-25-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JAN-31-2010 (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) AS TO DEFENDANT TU, LYNN

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2010 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO APR-22-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO PAY JUDGMENT IN FULL BY 4/7/10. IF NO APPEARANCES DISCHARGE OEX AS SATISFIED. DEFENDANT TO MAKE CHECK PAYABLE TO ALLANNA BLOUGH WHO WILL GIVE PLAINTIFF TAYLOR MCNEANEY HER SHARE OF JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED.
